name: saralsql
description: Language Server for SQL ( SSDT / Database Projects in VS Code)

saralsql.showParseIssues.description: Show parser issues from @saralsql/tsql-parser. When disabled, SaralSQL diagnostics are shown only for documents without parser issues.

saralsql.enableSchemaValidation.description: Enable schema diagnostics such as unknown table/column and ambiguous bare columns.

saralsql.sqlproj.strictBuildMembership.description: When a .sqlproj exists, only Build items contribute to workspace schema. None/PreDeploy/PostDeploy files are still validated locally.

saralsql.sqlproj.warnMissingProjectFile.description: Show SSDT001 when a .sql file is not included in any .sqlproj item.

saralsql.sqlproj.missingProjectFileSever.description: SSDT001: Severity for SQL files missing from all .sqlproj items.

saralsql.diagnostics.unknownTableSeverit.description: LSP001: Set the severity for unknown table diagnostics.

saralsql.diagnostics.unknownColumnSeveri.description: LSP002: Set the severity for unknown column diagnostics.

saralsql.diagnostics.ambiguousColumn.description: LSP003: Show ambiguous bare column diagnostics.

saralsql.diagnostics.ambiguousColumnSeve.description: LSP003: Set the severity for ambiguous bare column diagnostics.

saralsql.diagnostics.readabilityHint.description: LSP004: Show the readability hint that suggests qualifying a uniquely owned bare column.

saralsql.diagnostics.readabilityHintSeve.description: LSP004: Set the severity for the readability hint diagnostic.

saralsql.diagnostics.stringComparison.description: LSP005: Show warnings for direct varchar and nvarchar comparisons.

saralsql.diagnostics.stringComparisonSev.description: LSP005: Set the severity for varchar and nvarchar comparison warnings.

saralsql.diagnostics.unnamedKeyConstrain.description: DDL002: Show warnings for unnamed PRIMARY KEY and UNIQUE constraints.
DDL002: Set the severity for unnamed key constraint diagnostics.

saralsql.diagnostics.unnamedDefaultConst.description: DDL003: Show warnings for unnamed DEFAULT constraints.
DDL003: Set the severity for unnamed default constraint diagnostics.

saralsql.diagnostics.undeclaredVariable.description: VAR001: Show diagnostics for undeclared variables.

saralsql.diagnostics.undeclaredVariableS.description: VAR001: Set the severity for undeclared variable diagnostics.

saralsql.diagnostics.unusedVariable.description: VAR002: Show diagnostics for declared variables that are never used.

saralsql.diagnostics.unusedVariableSever.description: VAR002: Set the severity for unused variable diagnostics.

saralsql.diagnostics.unusedParameter.description: VAR003: Show diagnostics for declared parameters that are never used.

saralsql.diagnostics.unusedParameterSeve.description: VAR003: Set the severity for unused parameter diagnostics.

saralsql.diagnostics.variableUsedBeforeS.description: VAR004: Show diagnostics for variables that are used before being set.
VAR004: Set the severity for variable-used-before-set diagnostics.

saralsql.diagnostics.selfComparison.description: LOG001: Show diagnostics for self-comparisons such as column = column.

saralsql.diagnostics.selfComparisonSever.description: LOG001: Set the severity for self-comparison diagnostics.

saralsql.diagnostics.updateWithoutWhere.description: DML001: Show warnings for UPDATE statements without a WHERE clause.

saralsql.diagnostics.updateWithoutWhereS.description: DML001: Set the severity for UPDATE without WHERE diagnostics.

saralsql.diagnostics.deleteWithoutWhere.description: DML002: Show warnings for DELETE statements without a WHERE clause.

saralsql.diagnostics.deleteWithoutWhereS.description: DML002: Set the severity for DELETE without WHERE diagnostics.

saralsql.diagnostics.insertWithoutColumn.description: DML003: Show warnings for INSERT statements that omit a column list.
DML003: Set the severity for INSERT without column list diagnostics.

saralsql.diagnostics.updateTargetNoLock.description: DML004: Show errors when an UPDATE target uses WITH (NOLOCK).

saralsql.diagnostics.updateTargetNoLockS.description: DML004: Set the severity for UPDATE target NOLOCK diagnostics.

saralsql.disabledDiagnostics.description: Advanced. Disable specific diagnostics by code, such as LSP001, LSP003, LSP004, DML001, VAR002, or LOG001.

saralsql.exclude.description: Glob patterns to exclude from indexing

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
scripts.test:all-local: npm run test:regression && npm run test:validation
